title: Inception
overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: Fight Club
overview: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soapmaker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much more.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the events of Vietnam, Watergate, and other history unfold through the perspective of an Alabama man.

title: Lord of the Rings: Fellowship of the Ring
overview: A meek Hobbit and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the One Ring and the Dark Lord Sauron.

title: Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
overview: While Frodo and Sam edge closer to Mordor, the divided fellowship makes a stand against the dark lord Sauron.

title: Lord of the Rings: Return of the King
overview: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam.

title: Avatar
overview: A paraplegic Marine on an alien world joins the indigenous people's rebellion against colonial rule.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland.

title: Iron Man
overview: After being held captive in an Afghan cave, an industrialist creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.

title: The Avengers
overview: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together to stop Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.

title: Avengers: Infinity War
overview: The Avengers and their allies must stop Thanos from collecting all six Infinity Stones.

title: Avengers: Endgame
overview: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the Avengers assemble once more to reverse Thanos's actions.

title: The Matrix
overview: A hacker discovers the reality he lives in is a simulation and joins a rebellion against its machine controllers.

title: The Matrix Reloaded
overview: Neo and the rebel leaders mount an attack on the Matrix as the machine army continues its war on Zion.

title: Star Wars
overview: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Knight and an adventurous pilot to rescue a princess and save the galaxy.

title: The Empire Strikes Back
overview: After the Rebels are overpowered by the Empire, Luke Skywalker trains with Yoda while his friends are pursued by Darth Vader.

title: Return of the Jedi
overview: After rescuing Han Solo from Jabba the Hutt, the Rebels dispatch to Endor to destroy a more powerful Death Star.

title: Star Wars: The Last Jedi
overview: Rey develops her Jedi abilities with Luke Skywalker while the Resistance faces crushing defeats against the First Order.

title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens
overview: Three decades after the defeat of the Galactic Empire, a new threat arises. Rey, a desert scavenger, and Finn, an ex-stormtrooper must join Han Solo and Chewbacca to search for the one hope of the galaxy, Luke Skywalker.

title: Ratatouille
overview: A rat who can cook makes an unusual alliance with a young kitchen worker at a famous Paris restaurant.

title: Toy Story 3
overview: The toys are mistakenly delivered to a day-care center instead of the attic right before Andy leaves for college.

title: Kung Fu Panda
overview: A lazy, irreverent slacker panda must somehow become a kung fu master in order to save the Valley of Peace.

title: Toy Story
overview: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a new spaceman figure supplants him as top toy in a boy's room.

title: Cars
overview: A hotshot racecar named Lightning McQueen gets waylaid in Radiator Springs where he finds the true meaning of friendship and family.

title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
overview: Harry Potter and his friends face growing threats from Voldemort and the Ministry of Magic's dangerous interference at Hogwarts.

title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
overview: Harry Potter is selected to compete in a prestigious tournament and faces terrifying challenges while the Dark Lord rises.

title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
overview: An orphaned boy discovers he is a wizard and starts his education at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
overview: Harry Potter and his friends investigate a mysterious force that has left students petrified at Hogwarts.

title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
overview: Harry Potter, Ron and Hermione return to Hogwarts and face danger when a dangerous prisoner escapes from Azkaban.

title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
overview: Voldemort is tightening his grip on both the Muggle and wizarding worlds and Hogwarts is no longer the safe haven it once was.

title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows Part 1
overview: Harry, Ron and Hermione set out on a perilous mission to track down and destroy the Horcruxes, the keys to Voldemort's immortality.

title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows Part 2
overview: Harry, Ron and Hermione search for Voldemort's remaining Horcruxes in their effort to destroy the Dark wizard once and for all.

title: Robot
overview: A humanoid robot is brought to the present and must navigate human society while searching for his son.

title: Arrival
overview: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team is put together to investigate and interpret the language of the alien visitors.

title: The Dark Knight Rises
overview: Eight years after the Joker's reign of anarchy, the Dark Knight must return to confront the enigmatic masked villain Bane.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice when the Joker arrives.

title: Batman Begins
overview: After training with his mentor, Batman begins his fight to free crime-ridden Gotham City from corruption.

title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
overview: Sam Witwicky again joins the Autobots against their sworn enemies the Decepticons in another Earth-shaking battle.

title: Transformers
overview: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the location of a mysterious power source.

title: Transformers Dark of the Moon
overview: The Autobots learn of a Cybertronian spacecraft hidden on the Moon and race against the Decepticons to reach it.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: The Shawshank Redemption Clone
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control to his reluctant son.

title: The Godfather Part II
overview: The early life and career of Vito Corleone in 1920s New York is portrayed, while his son, Michael, expands and tightens his grip on the family crime syndicate.

title: Schindler's List
overview: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, industrialist Oskar Schindler becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce after witnessing their persecution.

title: 12 Angry Men
overview: A jury holdout attempts to prevent a miscarriage of justice by forcing his colleagues to reconsider the evidence.

title: Spirited Away
overview: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10 year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits.

title: Howl's Moving Castle
overview: When an old woman's spell curses young Sophie, she flees to a magical moving castle where she meets the wizard Howl.

title: Princess Mononoke
overview: On a journey to find the cure for a Tatarigami's curse, Ashitaka finds himself in the middle of a war between humans and forest gods.

title: My Neighbor Totoro
overview: Two girls move to the country with their father to be near their hospitalized mother, and have adventures with friendly forest spirits.

title: Shark Tale
overview: When a great white shark's son is found dead, a fish tells the whole shark community that he was the killer.

title: The Nightmare Before Christmas
overview: The denizen of Halloween Town discovers Christmas Town, but his attempts to take over the holiday causes a chaotic reaction.

title: Mulan
overview: To save her aging father from serving in the Imperial Army, a young Chinese woman secretly enlist in his place disguised as a man.

title: The Lion King
overview: Lion prince Simba and his father are targeted by his uncle, who wants to ascend the throne himself.

title: The Incredibles
overview: A family of undercover superheroes, while trying to live the quiet suburban life, are forced into action to save the world.

title: Aladdin
overview: A street urchin and a princess fall in love while battling an evil sorcerer in the magical city of Agrabah.

title: The Little Mermaid
overview: Ariel, a mermaid princess, makes a deal with a sea witch and falls in love with a human prince.

title: Alien
overview: After a space merchant vessel receives an unknown transmission as a distress call, one of the crew is attacked by a mysterious life form and they struggle to get back on track.

title: Aliens
overview: The planet from Alien has been colonized, but contact is lost, and a team including the original survivor are sent to investigate.

title: The Terminator
overview: A human soldier is sent from 2029 to 1984 to stop an almost indestructible cyborg killing machine from killing the woman who will lead mankind to freedom.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
overview: A cyborg, identical to the one who failed to kill Sarah Connor, must now protect her teenage son John Connor from a more advanced cyborg.

title: Oblivion
overview: A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question what he knows about his mission and himself.

title: Room
overview: A woman and her young son, who were kidnapped and held captive for years, find themselves in a new world that the boy must learn to experience for the first time.

title: In the Bedroom
overview: A couple's unresolved tensions over their son's love affair lead to tragedy in a small Maine town.

title: Frozen
overview: When the newly crowned Queen Elsa accidentally uses her power to turn things into ice to curse her home in infinite winter, her sister, Anna, teams up with a mountain man, his playful reindeer, and a snowman to change the weather condition.

title: Toy Story 4
overview: Woody has always been confident about his place in the world, and that his priority is taking care of his kid. But when Bonnie adds a reluctant new toy called Forky to her room, a road trip adventure takes Woody on an unexpected path.

title: Soul
overview: Joe Gardner is a middle-school band teacher whose true passion is jazz. He's on the brink of his big break when a misstep takes him to a fantastical place where he's determined to return to his life on Earth.

title: Luca
overview: A young boy and his best friend experience an unforgettable summer on the Italian Riviera. But all the fun is threatened by a secret: they are sea monsters.

title: Dune
overview: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to the most dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people.

title: Dune Part Two
overview: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family.

title: Rebel Moon Part One
overview: A peaceful colony on the edge of the galaxy finds itself threatened by the armies of the Motherworld and a young woman with a mysterious past.

title: Poor Things
overview: The incredible tale about the fantastical evolution of Bella Baxter, a young woman brought back to life by the brilliant and unorthodox scientist Dr. Godwin Baxter.

title: Spider-Man Across the Spider-Verse
overview: Miles Morales catapults across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence.

title: Puss in Boots The Last Wish
overview: Puss in Boots discovers that his passion for adventure has taken its toll when he has burned through eight of his nine lives.

title: Bullet Train
overview: Five assassins aboard a fast moving bullet train find out their missions have something in common.

title: Top Gun Maverick
overview: After thirty years, Maverick is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator, but must confront ghosts of his past when he leads TOP GUN's elite graduates on a mission.

title: Spider-Man Homecoming
overview: A young Peter Parker begins to navigate his newfound identity as the web-slinging super hero Spider-Man as he struggles to find his place in the world.

title: Spider-Man Far From Home
overview: Following the events of Avengers Endgame, Spider-Man must step up to take on new threats in a world that has changed forever.

title: Spider-Man No Way Home
overview: With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help. When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear.

title: Godzilla Minus One
overview: Post-war Japan is at its lowest point when a new crisis emerges in the form of a giant monster, baptized in the horrific power of the atomic bomb.

title: Migration
overview: After a migrating duck family alights on their pond with thrilling tales of far-flung lands, the Mallard family embarks on a family trip.

title: Back to the Future
overview: Marty McFly, a 17-year-old high school student, is accidentally sent 30 years into the past in a time-travelling DeLorean invented by his friend Dr. Emmett Brown.

title: Back to the Future Part II
overview: After visiting 2015, Marty McFly must repeat his visit to 1955 to prevent disastrous changes to 1985.

title: Se7en
overview: Two detectives, a rookie and a veteran, hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motives.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
overview: A young F.B.I. cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to help catch another serial killer.

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: GoodFellas
overview: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife and his mob partners.

title: Kingsman The Secret Service
overview: A spy organisation recruits an unrefined but promising street kid into the agency's ultra-competitive training program.

title: X-Men Days of Future Past
overview: The X-Men send Wolverine to the past to change a major historical event that could globally impact man and mutant kind.

title: X-Men
overview: Two mutants come to a private academy for their kind whose resident superhero team must oppose a terrorist organization with similar powers.

title: Jurassic Park
overview: A pragmatic paleontologist touring an almost-complete theme park is tasked with protecting a couple of kids after a power failure causes the park's cloned dinosaurs to run loose.

title: Jurassic World
overview: A new theme park, built on the original site of Jurassic Park, creates a genetically modified hybrid dinosaur, the Indominus Rex, which escapes containment and goes on a killing spree.

title: Terminator 3 Rise of the Machines
overview: A machine sent from the future tries to kill John Connor while a Terminator is sent back to protect him from an even more advanced killing machine.

title: Hancock
overview: A superhero who is not well-liked by the public is given a makeover by a PR officer.

title: Thor
overview: The powerful but arrogant god Thor is cast out of Asgard to live amongst humans in Midgard (Earth), where he soon becomes one of their finest defenders.

title: Thor Ragnarok
overview: Imprisoned on the planet Sakaar, Thor must race against time to return to Asgard and stop Ragnarok.

title: The Hurt Locker
overview: Forced to play a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse in the chaos of war, an elite Army bomb squad unit must neutralize bombs in the streets of Iraq.

title: Apocalypse Now
overview: A film about the Vietnam War in which a special agent receives orders to terminate the mission of a renegade colonel.

title: Inglourious Basterds
overview: In German-occupied France, young Jewish refugee Shosanna Dreyfus witnesses the slaughter of her family by Colonel Hans Landa.

title: Cruella
overview: A live-action prequel feature film following a young Cruella de Vil as she pursues a career in fashion.

title: Kingsman The Golden Circle
overview: When their headquarters are destroyed and the world is held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies in Statesman, their American counterpart.
